ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counterparties" (
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty */,
  "counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty */,
  "counterparty_type" TEXT /* Type of counterparty (e.g., customer, bank, insurer) */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the counterparty */,
  "legal_entity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the legal entity of the counterparty */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Registered address of the counterparty */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the counterparty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the counterparty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty involved in the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, settled) */,
  "trade_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trade is denominated */,
  "trade_maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the trade */,
  "trade_counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty involved in the trade (for quick reference) */,
  "trade_repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade repository where the trade is recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trade_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_repository_id") REFERENCES trade_repositories ("trade_repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_data_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., interest rate, credit spread) */,
  "market_data_value" REAL /* Value of the market data */,
  "market_data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data source */,
  "market_data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data source (for quick reference) */,
  "market_data_currency" TEXT /* Currency associated with the market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_source_id") REFERENCES market_data_sources ("market_data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_risk_metrics" (
  "credit_risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit risk calculation */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty */,
  "epe" REAL /* Expected Positive Exposure (EPE) */,
  "ene" REAL /* Expected Negative Exposure (ENE) */,
  "pfe" REAL /* Potential Future Exposure (PFE) */,
  "expected_collateral" REAL /* Expected collateral */,
  "basel_ee" REAL /* Basel Expected Exposure (EE) */,
  "basel_eee" REAL /* Basel Expected Exposure under stressed conditions (EEE) */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit risk metrics were calculated */,
  "calculation_version" TEXT /* Version of the risk calculation model used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level for the PFE calculation */,
  "collateral_amount" REAL /* Amount of collateral posted by the counterparty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit risk metrics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit risk metrics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_risk_metrics_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "report_approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_report_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_report_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high risk, large exposure) */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "alert_resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("alert_resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., risk_manager, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "compliance_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "compliance_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., Basel III, Dodd-Frank) */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "report_approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_report_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_report_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "market_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data source */,
  "market_data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data source */,
  "market_data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of market data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the market data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the market data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_repositories" (
  "trade_repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade repository */,
  "trade_repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade repository */,
  "trade_repository_type" TEXT /* Type of trade repository (e.g., DTCC, CME) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the trade repository */,
  "repository_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade repository record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade repository record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_repository_id")
)
